view.title: Validate explicit UC need #5

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for equal opportunity in booking.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for equal opportunity in booking.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Equal opportunity (no priority tiers)', but the evidence provided does not confirm whether this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case describes a scenario where multiple users are notified simultaneously, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the system enforces equal opportunity without priority tiers. This lack of direct evidence leads to an inconclusive verdict regarding the requirement's coverage.

gaps: No evidence confirming that the booking process does not favor any user over another.
